untranslatable_reason: Signal requires analysis of order book quantity imbalances and microstructure patterns (quantity standard deviation, imbalance direction shifts, cross-market lead-lag relationships). These require order book depth data and custom quantity metrics not available in the standard price/volume/technical indicator set. The signal explicitly states entry is based on 'quantity pattern alone' with 'no requirement for secondary market confirmation', which cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and technical indicators.
translation_notes: MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_17_2 is a microstructure arbitrage signal focused on predictive order flow analysis. It requires: (1) quantity_signal_threshold_stddev measurements on order book imbalances, (2) detection of imbalance direction shifts at the tick level, (3) cross-market lead detection without price dislocation. Standard technical indicators (RSI, MACD, volume ratios, etc.) do not capture the tick-level order imbalance dynamics this strategy depends on. To implement this signal, a custom indicator computing order book quantity imbalances (e.g., cumulative signed volume, order imbalance ratio) would be required.
